summary: Iteration 39 - Complete Production Audit for Titelli Social Commerce Platform. All 38 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified for all pages. Stripe is in LIVE mode (sk_live_51RelvgKG28DxZ5CC...).

minor.issue: WebSocket connection closes before established (non-blocking, reconnection attempts visible)

issues: Splash screen takes ~5 seconds to load - may affect user experience

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ All 3 authentication types working: client, enterprise (entreprise), admin
✅ RDV chez Titelli: 8 categories, offers CRUD, romantic subscription (200 CHF/month), invitation acceptance (2 CHF)
✅ Sports & Compétitions: 11 sports categories, matches, teams/my endpoint, competitions
✅ Gamification: Profile with points/levels, 8 levels (Débutant to Titan), badges, leaderboard
✅ Parrainage: Unique code (TIT prefix), stats, leaderboard
✅ Titelli Pro++: Enterprise-only (403 for clients), 199 CHF/month subscription, deliveries, liquidations
✅ Specialists: 10 categories, 3 lifestyle passes (Healthy 99 CHF, Better You 149 CHF, MVP 299 CHF)
✅ All Stripe checkout URLs redirect to https://checkout.stripe.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: All systems verified in production mode. Stripe LIVE keys confirmed. Database contains: 60 users, 6482 enterprises, 5 shared_offers, 1 referral. Email service Resend configured.

rdv_chez_titelli.categories: ✅ 8 categories (restaurant, sport, wellness, culture, nature, party, creative, other)

sports_competitions.categories: ✅ 11 sports (football, tennis, basketball, volleyball, badminton, padel, running, swimming, cycling, fitness, other)

gamification.levels: ✅ 8 levels (Débutant, Amateur, Confirmé, Expert, Master, Champion, Légende, Titan)

specialists.passes: ✅ 3 passes (Healthy 99 CHF, Better You 149 CHF, MVP 299 CHF)

frontend_pages_verified.client_dashboard: ✅ /dashboard/client - Stats cards, sidebar menu, Premium upgrade, Parrainage
